column1: # Room house curve: a gentle bass lift above the through-band.
# Referenced to the through-band (0 dB from ~200 Hz upward)
# say how much to lift the bass relative to the level where the correction hands
# off to the uncorrected region above the cutoff. It returns to 0 dB by ~200 Hz
# so it crosses over cleanly (no dip or boost at the cutoff).

column2: or as a reference overlay on the fit graphs.
